title: galium pusillum var. hypnoides
intro: Galium pusillum var. hypnoides, commonly known as Small Bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the bedstraw family (Galium). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and antiseptic. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive problems and skin conditions. Galium pusillum var. hypnoides is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in salves or ointments for topical application.
